Infectum.turoyo: A ftile du gelo bu rabәʕ mәd konәšfi qm i šәmšo, kokәmči ʕal ḥḏoḏe.
translations:
(İlyas p.c, this happens to fresh grass in the hill country end
			of may)

Infectum.turoyo: Ap pallat da ilone mәd konәṯri, kokәmči bә ḥḏoḏe
İ palle mәd konәšfo, kokәmčo bә ḥḏoḏe. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
A
			leaf when it dries up, withers down.

U
			talgo mәd dkoṯe maṭro aʕle kokomač bә ḥḏoḏe. (İlyas
			p.c)

Infectum.turoyo: I kalo d Nisane nәha/uʕdo kәmkamčo aʕla. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
‘’She
			produces a motion of dissatisfaction and contempt.’’
I will shove the clothes into the bag.

1)U abro makmačwa ʕal u
			babo d kәtwa sowo. (İlyas p.c)

1)U
			aġa makmačwa ʕal u greʕo. (İlyas p.c)

Infectum.turoyo: Ap pallat da ilone kokәmdi/kokaymi bu saṯwo. Leaves become black in winter. (İlyas p.c)

Preterit.turoyo: lu ḥuldo grәšle u+šrulo, ŭ mi+šәmšo du+qayṭo kamәd ʕal ḥḏoḏe omar, ‘U+medawo, dlo elux xlәqlux, dlo+taʕibat ebe sәmlux, bnaqla dhawi ŭ hne, kamәd ʕal ḥḏode, komәqḥorat mine?
translations:
lu
			ḥuldo grәšle u+šrulo, ŭ mi+šәmšo du+qayṭo kamәd ʕal
			ḥḏoḏe

‘Talpidae
			removed the melon's foliage, and it shriveled in the summer sun’
			(Ilyas p.c.)

‘Talpidae
			removed the melon's foliage, and it shriveled in the summer sun’
			(Ilyas p.c.)

he says, ‘That thing, that you did not create, on that you did
			not weary yourself, you did not do, that appeared in one moment
			and whatsited,  shriveled together, are you angry about it? (254
			Jonah)
